title: Transfer Learning Path
description: Build fluency in Transfer Learning inside Learning Paradigms by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Domain adaptation validation
steps.summary: Domain adaptation validation belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Transfer Learning. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Transfer Learning. Start after Validation and Domain Adaptation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
